headings.style: elegant, high contrast, large, generous spacing

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. p-12, p-16, p-24 for sections to create breathing room.
spacing_and_layout.grid: Bento layouts for categories. Optical alignment.

components.navbar: Sticky, backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60, border-b border-[#D4AF37]/20, gold underline on active links.
components.cards: Premium minimal luxury feel. Subtle gold borders (border-[#D4AF37]/20), hover gold glow (shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(212,175,55,0.15)]), flat backgrounds.
components.buttons: Uppercase, slight letter spacing. Hover states must have text color transition and glow.
components.images: High contrast, dark overlays to ensure text readability.

pages.home: Sticky blurred navbar, full-width hero slider, category grid, featured products, contact, footer.
pages.product_detail: Image gallery, video preview placeholder, WhatsApp/Call CTAs, description.
pages.admin: Admin panel at /admin-x9k2l-secret. Same black/gold theme. Login, dashboard with sidebar, CRUD tables.

interactions.animations: Gold hover glow, smooth scroll-reveal (framer-motion), micro-animations on cards and buttons.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Cormorant Garamond and Outfit from Google Fonts.
Use standard Tailwind classes for #0a0a0a and #D4AF37.
Do NOT build a checkout or cart system, only WhatsApp / Call-to-action buttons on product pages.
Admin panel MUST be located at /admin-x9k2l-secret. It must retain the black and gold luxury aesthetics.
Ensure 100% adherence to dark mode luxury principles (high contrast, ample spacing, slow smooth interactions).
